name: canshare-tnm-gist-gastric-omental-stage-group
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal stromal tumour gastric and/or omental stage group
description: The stage groups that describe how far a gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) gastric and/or omental has grown and spread, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
